title: localization — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two attributes. #[Translatable] marks Eloquent properties for per-locale storage in a `translations` JSONB column. #[AsTranslation] on class marks the container.

params.name: column
params.description: JSONB column on the model storing localised values. Shape: { locale_code: { field: value } }.

params.name: fallback
params.description: How to resolve when the active locale is missing. `app_default` = config('localization.fallback_locale'). `tenant_default` = the TenantLocale row where is_fallback=true (falls through to app_default when no tenant fallback set). `none` = return null (caller handles blank UX). Any BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. `en`, `fr-CA`) pins the fallback to that specific locale.

params.name: required_locales
params.description: Locale codes that MUST have values (validation rule). Empty = no constraint. Each entry is a BCP-47 tag validated against PlatformLanguage.locale_code so typos surface at schema-load time.

params.name: max_length
params.description: Per-locale max character length. Null = no limit. Applied by the `translatable_length_per_locale` validation rule when the property receives writes.

params.name: wire_include_key
params.description: Wire envelope include key. `GET /api/v1/plans/{id}?include=translations` returns the full JSONB blob under `data.translations`; without the include, only the active-locale scalar is projected onto the field name. Change to distinguish multiple #[AsTranslation] containers on a single model (rare).

attributes.name: AsTranslation

params.name: column
params.description: Class-level default for the JSONB column name (avoids repeating on every property).
